channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Münchendorf
item.description: Due to an switch fault, train journeys to expected 19 19:30 watch are limited. [Since 18.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to an switch fault, train journeys to expected 19 19:30 watch are limited.
[Since 18.06.2026]

item.title: N20: construction works Fatty-George-Gasse
item.description: Because of construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse area, line N20 is being redirected Monday - Friday. [08.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse area, line N20 is being redirected Monday - Friday.
[08.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]

item.title: 99A/99B: construction works Fatty-George-Gasse
item.description: Due to construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse, the lines 99A and 99B will be redirected. Period: Tuesday, July 07, 2026, around 08:00 a.m. to about nine weeks. [07.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the Fatty-George-Gasse, the lines 99A and 99B will be redirected. Period: Tuesday, July 07, 2026, around 08:00 a.m. to about nine weeks.
[07.07.2026 – 18.06.2027]

item.title: 93A/98A: construction works Oberdorfstraße
item.description: Due to roadworks in the Oberdorfstraße and the associated prov. one-way guide from Langobardenstraße to Aspernstraße, the buses are redirected. [18.06.2026 – 18.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to roadworks in the Oberdorfstraße and the associated prov. one-way guide from Langobardenstraße to Aspernstraße, the buses are redirected.
[18.06.2026 – 18.06.2027]

item.title: 99A: Wehrbrücklstraße
item.description: Stop change of line 99A towards Eßling, Schule Stop: Wehrbrücklstraße From: Niklas-Eslarn-Straße2XX 78 To: Niklas-Eslarn-Straße 82 Duration: 22 June … [18.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line 99A towards Eßling, Schule Stop: Wehrbrücklstraße From: Niklas-Eslarn-Straße2XX 78 To: Niklas-Eslarn-Straße 82 Duration: 22 June …
[18.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]

item.title: 38: service obstruction due to rescue operation
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 18.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 18.06.2026]

item.title: 61A: Liesing, fire station
item.description: Stop change of line 61A towards Vösendorf, Siebenhirten Stop: Liesing, fire station From: Siebenhirtenstraße 12 To: Siebenhirtenstraße 8-10 Duration … [17.06.2026 – 22.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line 61A towards Vösendorf, Siebenhirten Stop: Liesing, fire station From: Siebenhirtenstraße 12 To: Siebenhirtenstraße 8-10 Duration …
[17.06.2026 – 22.06.2026]

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Wien Praterstern
item.description: Due to construction works there are no trains between Wien Floridsdorf station (U) and Wien Praterstern station (U) from 04.07.2026 to 06.09.2026. [Since 17.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works there are no trains between Wien Floridsdorf station (U) and Wien Praterstern station (U) from 04.07.2026 to 06.09.2026.
[Since 17.06.2026]

item.title: 10A/63A: crane works Grieshofgasse on 24.06.2026
item.description: Due to crane works in the Grieshofgasse, the 10A and 63A buses must be redirected. [16.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to crane works in the Grieshofgasse, the 10A and 63A buses must be redirected.
[16.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]

item.title: 10A/37A/40A: construction works Dänenstraße
item.description: Because of construction works in the Max-Emanuel-Straße, Peter-Jordan-Straße and Dänenstraße lines 10A, 37A and 40A are redirected. [01.06.2026 – 01.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Max-Emanuel-Straße, Peter-Jordan-Straße and Dänenstraße lines 10A, 37A and 40A are redirected.
[01.06.2026 – 01.06.2027]
